DejaView n · docs.demo-acme.io
https://docs.demo-acme.io/zh/design/timeline.html
Updated 2026-07-15#142repliesv0.8.2
DejaView时间线设计/TimelineDesignNotes
DejaView把屏幕活动建模为一条单调递增的事件流（timeline）。每张截图经过OCR与语义理解后产出一条原子事件，事件按时间戳排序写入Postgres。
Timeline is modeled as a strictly monotonic event stream. Each screenshot becomes one atomic event after OcR + perception, persisted to Postgres with an HNsW embedding index.

acme-parser CHANGELOG
v0.4.1-2026-07-09
Fixed a tokenizer crash on empty input and added streaming lex mode.Memory footprint reduced by roughly 18%on the dejaview-core capture workload.
+ Lexer::with_streaming(） for chunked input
* token table size:64KB -> 52KB

zephyr-index FAQ · DO□
https://docs.demo-acme.io/zh/zephyr-index/faq.html
Updated 2026-06-30#58replies
zephyr-index常见问题/FAQ
Q1:向量维度可以改吗?
默认1024维（Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B)。升级到4B模型时用MRL截断回1024维,schema不变，但需要全量重嵌。
Default is1024dims.Upgrading to the4Bmodel usesMRLtruncationbackto1024so theschema staysthesame,but a full re-embed isrequired.
Q2:支持多大数据量？
单机HNSW实测412万向量，召回率98.2%,p50查询12mS。更大规模建议分片。
参考/ References
https://docs.demo-acme.io/zh/zephyr-index/tuning.html
https://docs.demo-acme.io/zh/zephyr-index/sharding.html

nova-cipher  · SEC-2026-0142

https://security.demo-acme.io/advisories/SEC-2026-0142.html
Published 2026-07-11severity:high CVE-N/A (synthetic)
nova-cipher 安全公告/ Advisory SEC-2026-0142
A synthetic advisory for the nova-cipher signing path. Affected versions: nova-cipher >= 0.3.0 and < 0.3.4. The Verify path did not check the issuer field on ed25519 envelopes.
受影响版本/ Affected
nova-cipher >= 0.3.0, < 0.3.4
fix: 0.3.4 (released 2026-07-11)
credits: sam_qa (synthetic reporter)
升级/ Upgrade
升级到0.3.4或以上，然后运行^zephyrkeysrotate轮换密钥。
https://docs.demo-acme.io/en/nova-cipher/upgrade.html
https://security.demo-acme.io/diffs/nova-0.3.4.patch
